name: Freezer Mix Pizzawiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Mix tomato paste, Parmesan cheese, freezer mix, and seasonings together.
3. Spread the mixture onto bread slices or hamburger bun halves.
4. Place the prepared sandwiches on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake until the cheese is bubbly, for 5 to 10 minutes.
